nasb.text: Behold, they belch forth with their mouth; Swords are in their lips, For, they say, “Who hears?”

esv.text: There they are, bellowing with their mouths with swords in their lips— for “Who,” they think, “will hear us?”

cnv.text: 看哪！他們口中吐出惡言， 他們嘴裡吐出利刀， 他們心裡說：“有誰聽見呢？”

ccb.text: 他们出口伤人，舌如利剑， 还说：“谁听得见？”

csbs.text: 看哪，他们口中吐出恶言， 嘴唇间有刀剑！ 他们说：“谁能听见呢？”
